registration.privacyNoticeVisitorDesc: We collect the information you enter to issue and manage a visitor parking pass for the property you are visiting.
registration.privacyNoticeResidentDesc: We collect the information you enter to create and manage your resident account and related parking records for your building.
registration.privacyVisitorCollected: We collect your vehicle details, contact details, unit/building details, and pass timing.
registration.privacyResidentCollected: We collect your resident registration details, unit and stall details, vehicle information if provided, and account credentials.
registration.privacyTechnical: Web submissions also record technical details such as IP address and browser user agent.
registration.privacyVisitorUse: We use this information to issue passes, send service messages, enforce parking rules, and protect the service from misuse.
registration.privacyResidentUse: We use this information to activate your account, manage resident parking records, send service messages, and protect the service from misuse.
registration.privacyShared: Information may be shared with authorized property management, security staff, service providers, or authorities where required by law.
registration.privacyRetention: We keep personal information only as long as reasonably necessary for these purposes and to meet legal requirements.
registration.privacyFullPolicyPrefix: You can read the full policy and contact information at
registration.privacyVisitorConsent: I have read the privacy notice and privacy policy, and I consent to the collection, use, and disclosure of my personal information for visitor parking administration.
registration.privacyResidentConsent: I have read the privacy notice and privacy policy, and I consent to the collection, use, and disclosure of my personal information for resident account setup and parking administration.
registration.privacyPolicyDesc: Alina Visitor Parking - How we handle your personal information
registration.privacyIntro1: Alina Visitor Parking provides a visitor parking registration service for residential properties. This Privacy Policy explains how personal information is collected, used, disclosed, and protected when you use the service.
registration.privacyIntro2: For visitor parking activity in British Columbia, we intend this policy to reflect the Personal Information Protection Act (British Columbia) and other applicable Canadian privacy requirements. Depending on how the service is operated or where information is processed, other privacy laws may also apply.
registration.privacyCollectIntro: When you register a visitor parking pass, we collect information such as:
registration.privacyCollectVehicle: Vehicle information: license plate number and vehicle details you provide, such as make, model, year, colour, and plate jurisdiction where applicable.
registration.privacyCollectContact: Contact information: phone number and email address.
registration.privacyCollectVisit: Visit details: the building and unit you are visiting, requested parking duration, and pass timestamps.
registration.privacyCollectTechnical: Technical information: for web submissions, we may record IP address, browser user agent, and related request metadata for security, troubleshooting, and service integrity purposes.
registration.privacyNoPayment: We do not ask for payment card information through this registration flow. Please do not provide sensitive personal information that is not required for visitor parking.
registration.privacyUseIntro: We use personal information for the following purposes:
registration.privacyUseAdmin: Parking pass administration: to create, validate, display, update, and manage visitor parking passes.
registration.privacyUseEnforcement: Parking enforcement and compliance: to verify authorization, identify misuse, and support the property's parking administration processes.
registration.privacyUseComms: Service communications: to send confirmations, reminders, and other operational notices related to the parking session.
registration.privacyUseSecurity: Security and fraud prevention: to detect duplicate or abusive use, investigate issues, and maintain the integrity of the service.
registration.privacyUseLegal: Legal and operational obligations: to comply with applicable law, respond to lawful requests, and maintain appropriate internal records.
registration.privacyNoMarketing: We do not use this registration information for unrelated marketing purposes.
registration.privacyConsent1: By acknowledging the privacy notice and submitting a visitor parking registration, you consent to the collection, use, and disclosure of your personal information for the purposes described in this policy.
registration.privacyConsent2: You may ask questions about these practices or seek to withdraw consent, subject to legal or contractual restrictions and reasonable notice. If required information cannot be used for parking administration, we may be unable to issue or maintain a pass.
registration.privacyDisclosureIntro: We may disclose personal information where reasonably necessary to operate the service:
registration.privacyDisclosureProperty: Property management and authorized staff: including strata, condominium, building management, and security personnel responsible for parking administration at the property you are visiting.
registration.privacyDisclosureProviders: Service providers: providers that help host, support, or communicate through the service, acting on our instructions or under appropriate contractual terms.
registration.privacyDisclosureLegal: Legal authorities or other parties: where required or permitted by applicable law.
registration.privacyNoSell: We do not sell personal information collected through the visitor parking registration flow.
registration.privacyRetention1: We retain personal information only for as long as reasonably necessary for the purposes described in this policy, our documented retention practices, and applicable legal requirements.
registration.privacyRetentionPassRecords: Visitor parking records may remain available while a pass is active and for a reasonable period afterward to support administration, dispute handling, enforcement, security review, and system integrity.
registration.privacyRetentionDecision: Records used to make a decision that directly affects an individual may be retained for at least the minimum period required by applicable law.
registration.privacyRetentionDelete: Information that is no longer required will be deleted, anonymized, or otherwise removed from routine use within our normal data-management processes.
registration.privacySecurity1: We use reasonable administrative, technical, and physical safeguards appropriate to the sensitivity of the information and the nature of the service.
registration.privacySecurityAccess: Access controls intended to limit personal information to authorized users.
registration.privacySecuritySystems: Security measures to protect the web service and related systems from unauthorized access or misuse.
registration.privacySecurityProcesses: Operational processes for reviewing incidents, misuse, and service activity.
registration.privacySecurityNoGuarantee: No method of storage or transmission is completely secure, but we work to protect personal information against unauthorized access, use, disclosure, or loss.
registration.privacyRightsIntro: Subject to applicable law, you may have the right to:
registration.privacyRightsAccess: Access: request access to your personal information.
registration.privacyRightsCorrection: Correction: request correction of inaccurate personal information.
registration.privacyRightsQuestions: Questions or complaints: contact us about our privacy practices or make a complaint if you believe your information has been handled improperly.
registration.privacyRightsWithdrawal: Withdrawal of consent: ask to withdraw consent, subject to legal or operational limits.
registration.privacyRightsContact: Please contact us using the information in Section 10. Where applicable, we will respond within the time required by law.
registration.privacyRules1: The visitor parking rules enforced through this Service are established by the strata/condominium corporation that manages the property you are visiting, not by us. Enforcement actions are carried out by the property's authorized management or security personnel in accordance with applicable property rules and law.
registration.privacyRules2: This Service facilitates the administration of visitor parking but does not independently determine or resolve all enforcement disputes. Questions about a specific property's parking rules should be directed to that property's management.
registration.privacyContact1: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, would like to request access or correction, or have a concern about how personal information is handled, please contact the property manager, strata/condominium corporation, or organization that provided your parking registration link.
registration.privacyContactBoxTitle: Privacy contact for your property or service provider
registration.privacyContactBoxDesc: Use the contact information made available by the property or the operator of this service.
registration.privacyContactRegulators: You may also contact the Office of the Information and Privacy Commissioner for British Columbia at www.oipc.bc.ca. If federal privacy law applies to your situation, you may also contact the Office of the Privacy Commissioner of Canada at www.priv.gc.ca.
registration.privacyChanges1: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. When we do, we will post the updated version and revise the Last updated date. Material changes will apply to future uses of the service after the updated notice has been presented.
